iti14:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti14:2.1:
“Monks, I don’t envision even one other hindrance–
hindered by which people go wandering & transmigrating on for a long, long time–like the hindrance of ignorance.
iti14:2.2: Hindered by the hindrance of ignorance, people go wandering & transmigrating on for a long, long time.”
iti14:3.3: that they wander on, day & night,
iti14:3.4: as when they’re obstructed by delusion.
iti14:4.1: But those who, letting go of delusion,
